---
title: "Parttime Slowmoving Rodent"
authors:
  - name: "barisdurmus"
    url: "https://github.com/barisdurmus"
  - name: "ziyangn1"
    url: "https://github.com/ziyangn1"
  - name: "PeterPotz"
    url: "https://github.com/PeterPotz"
authors_links: "[barisdurmus](https://github.com/barisdurmus), [ziyangn1](https://github.com/ziyangn1), [PeterPotz](https://github.com/PeterPotz)"
rank: 4
---
**Screencast**

<video controls width="100%" style="margin-bottom: 2em;"><source src="group_parttime_slowmoving_rodent_screencast.mp4" type="video/mp4"></video>
**Ausarbeitung**

<iframe src="Projekt_Facebook.html" loading="lazy" width="100%" height="1200" style="border:0"></iframe>
